rulings.Case Title: JAIME MALDONADO VS. SUSANA E. MALDONADO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Relilef From Order Sustaining Demurrer And Judgment Of Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 19, 2023 line 1. PLAINTIFF JAIME MALDONADO Notice Of Motion For Relilef From Order Sustaining Demurrer And Judgment Of Dismissal is CONTINUED to May 10, 2023, on the condition that the parties present a stipulation and order to be executed at the hearing or a hard copy of the stipulation and order is delivered by 9:30 a.m. on April 19, 2023. If not, the matter will be taken off calendar.=(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: CEDRIC BERMOND VS. JOSE TORRES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 19, 2023 line 7. DEFENDANT JOSE TORRES DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. The moving party failed to carry their burden that SFRO 37.9A(h)(1) was triggered. Moreover, Defendant failed to show that failure to comply with the reporting requirement of SFRO 37.9A(h)(1) is fatal to this unlawful detainer. Request for Judicial Notice is Granted. =(503/SKF) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
